title: Trump tells CNBC he expects U.S. to make ‘great deal’ with Iran
summary_full: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said he expects the U.S. and Israel war against Iran to end soon since it began in late February.
summary_public: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said he expects the U.S. and Israel war against Iran to end soon since it began in late February.
